task: Go to the URL and read the text from the canvas CAPTCHA and enter it to complete the task. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/canvas-captcha.html
graderReasoning: The user requested to navigate to a specific URL, read the text from a canvas CAPTCHA, and enter it into an input field. The agent successfully navigated to the provided URL. Initially, the agent attempted to use `captcha.readText` but the vision model returned a refusal message. The agent then intelligently pivoted to taking a full-page screenshot after a short delay, which revealed the CAPTCHA text 'CAPTCHA123' clearly. It then correctly identified the input field and filled it with the extracted text. The page subsequently confirmed the challenge was successfully completed. The agent demonstrated good problem-solving and adaptability when the direct OCR tool failed, resorting to visual inspection of a screenshot, which is a valid and effective strategy for this type of challenge.
